evals.name: proxy-parity-debug
evals.prompt: built-claude 和 official-claude 在同一个 Claude Code 配置下疑似 HTTPS_PROXY 行为不同。请设计并执行一个最小可复现的代理抓流对比，要求不要泄露 token，只报告 CONNECT 目标、状态、字节数和 artifact 路径。
evals.expected_output: A concise debugging report that uses the bundled proxy or equivalent proxy capture, keeps official/local config equal, records commands/artifacts, redacts secrets, and explains HTTPS CONNECT opacity.
assertions: Mentions keeping official-claude and built-claude configuration equivalent except the binary or explicit proxy variable.
Uses HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY or a local proxy capture workflow.
Reports only redacted facts such as CONNECT target/status/byte counts/artifact paths, not tokens or full request bodies.
Explains that HTTPS payloads are opaque without MITM.

evals.name: noninteractive-debug
evals.prompt: 我想检查 ./built-claude --print 的输出格式和 exit code 是否跟 ./official-claude 一致，同时打开 --debug-file。给我一个可执行的 debug 步骤和最终报告格式。
evals.expected_output: A non-interactive debug procedure that captures stdout/stderr separately, exit codes, debug files, help/flag verification when needed, and a compact redacted report format.
assertions: Uses non-interactive --print commands for both binaries.
Captures stdout, stderr, and exit code separately.
Keeps secrets redacted and reports byte counts or relevant excerpts only.

evals.name: sse-websocket-proxy
evals.prompt: 帮我验证 claude-debug 里的 http-proxy-debug.mjs 对 SSE 流式响应和 WebSocket/Upgrade 场景是否可用。需要本地起 mock server，经过代理访问，输出验证证据和限制说明。
evals.expected_output: A local proxy verification report for SSE/plain HTTP streaming and WebSocket or Upgrade behavior, including commands/artifacts, proxy JSONL events, limitations, and no secret leakage.
assertions: Starts or describes a local mock server with SSE and WebSocket/Upgrade endpoints.
Routes requests through http-proxy-debug.mjs or an equivalent HTTP proxy path.
Verifies proxy logs include HTTP request/response or upgrade/tunnel byte-count evidence.
States limitations for HTTPS/TLS, HTTP/2, SSE, and WebSocket payload visibility.
